steps.title: Identify the key contradiction
steps.content: Researchers found that the basking shark's body temperature is consistently 1.0–1.5°C warmer than the surrounding water. This directly contradicts the prior classification as a “full ectotherm.”

steps.title: Match to the target meaning
steps.content: The target meaning is “unable to be maintained or defended”—a position that can't be held when contradicted by evidence. Untenable expresses this exactly. The other choices don't convey indefensibility; they address other concepts instead. That matches choice B — B is correct.
